title: Monocular Chickens (Formerly LavidaCraft Chickens)
description: Gives chickens eyes on the side of their heads rather than in front.
body:
This pack adds back the chicken textures with eyes on the sides of their heads that were removed from LavidaCraft 1.11.

As part of my minipack series I will likely only update it if it becomes incompatible with newer versions of Minecraft.
<details>
<summary>Permissions</summary>

 
You may:
- Create and publish modified versions
- Include this in modpacks published to Modrinth

You may not:
- Reupload or redistribute this pack or any assets from this page in ANY form
  
</details>

<details>
<summary>About Updates</summary>

I usually only test pack updates on the latest version of Minecraft. Resource packs are almost always backwards and forwards compatible. If you experience any issues or if the pack doesn't work, please report it to me.

</details>

If you have a feature request, feel free to create an issue on my issue tracker

Consider leaving a small tip on Venmo? @Lad_Flaver
